headline.purpose: Auth headings, page titles, and large widget headings.

title.purpose: Widget titles, card headings, and compact section headers.

body.purpose: Posts, forms, helper text, and modal content.

label.purpose: Form labels, nav items, buttons, table labels, and metadata.

shadows.name: admin-soft-panel
shadows.purpose: Soft grouping for backend settings, payment, and subscription panels.

shadows.name: flat-feed-card
shadows.purpose: Default public feed cards and media cards at rest.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, active, and dropdown state changes.

motion.name: legacy-hover
motion.purpose: Existing backend link hover behavior; do not extend it to complex layout motion.

components.name: Primary Public Button
components.description: Purple pill action for logged-in public social workflows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #5a2ff9; color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 50px; padding: 10px 32px; font: 600 14px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4929c2; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5a2ff9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Auth Accent Button
components.description: Warm orange login/register action from the auth split screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-auth { background: #ff7856; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #ff7856; border-radius: 5px; padding: 10px 32px; font: 600 18px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-auth:hover { background: #e86445; border-color: #e86445; } .ds-btn-auth:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5a2ff9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Rounded Field
components.description: Soft public input used for search, chat, comments, and product forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 5px; color: #101010; font: 500 14px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { background: #f3f3f3; color: #212529; border: 0; border-radius: 50px; padding: 10px 20px; font: 400 16px/1.5 system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: #949494; opacity: 1; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5a2ff9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Feed Card
components.description: Flat white public content card for posts, media, widgets, and sidebar modules.
components.html:
Community update

White surface, compact padding, and clear text hierarchy.
components.css: .ds-feed-card { background: #fff; color: #212529; border: 1px solid #dedede; border-radius: 5px; padding: 20px; max-width: 360px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-feed-card h3 { color: #101010; margin: 0 0 10px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.25; font-weight: 600; } .ds-feed-card p { color: #212529; margin: 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Compact icon-plus-label item for the logged-in module navigation.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 44px; padding: 8px 10px; color: #101010; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; font: 500 15px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover, .ds-nav-item-active { background: #dfd9f6; color: #5a2ff9; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5a2ff9; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 25px; height: 25px; display: inline-grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; color: #5a2ff9; }

components.name: Admin Soft Panel
components.description: Light backend management panel with Poppins typography and soft elevation.
components.html:
Payments

Compact backend panel for settings and reports.
components.css: .ds-admin-panel { background: #fff; color: #181c32; border-radius: 5px; padding: 18px; box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, .06); font-family: Poppins, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-admin-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 10px; color: #181c32; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.25; font-weight: 600; } .ds-admin-panel p { margin: 0; color: #6c6c6c; font-size: 16px; line-height: 25px; }

narrative.overview: Sociopro is a task-heavy social product, not a brand showcase. Its design system should feel like a familiar community console: posts, sidebars, cards, forms, tables, badges, and controls are recognizable first, expressive second. The app can carry personality through the purple/orange accent vocabulary and rounded social controls, but the interface earns trust through consistency, readable density, and clear state handling.
keyCharacteristics: Dense social-app layout with left navigation, central content, and right contextual panels.
Purple is the main public action color; blue is mostly an admin/dashboard action color.
Surfaces stay white or very light gray, with borders and subtle shadows doing practical separation.
Rounded social controls are common, but cards remain modestly rounded.
Form states, auth controls, payment controls, and destructive actions must be explicit.

rules.name: The One Accent Per Surface Rule
rules.body: A single screen can emphasize public purple, auth orange, or admin blue, but not all three as competing primary actions.

rules.name: The White Card Contract
rules.body: Cards and widgets rest on white or near-white surfaces. If a panel becomes colorful, it must communicate a status or selected state, not decoration.

rules.name: The Familiar Sans Rule
rules.body: Product labels, buttons, tables, and navigation stay in the existing sans vocabulary. Do not introduce decorative fonts into task surfaces.

rules.name: The Dense Legibility Rule
rules.body: Dense screens are allowed, but text smaller than 14px needs a specific metadata or badge reason.

rules.name: The Flat Until Needed Rule
rules.body: Default content cards are flat. Add shadow only for admin grouping, hover affordance, or overlays that need separation.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: Do not combine a thin border with a large decorative blur. Pick a border or a small functional shadow.

dos: Do use Public Action Purple for primary public social actions and Admin Action Blue for backend management actions.
Do keep Blade components and views presentation-only; new UI should consume prepared data and not query in templates.
Do use white cards on light gray surfaces for feeds, sidebars, auth, and dashboard panels.
Do preserve Bootstrap-compatible markup, forms, dropdowns, modals, offcanvas navigation, and table conventions unless a replacement is deliberately designed.
Do show clear focus, hover, disabled, loading, empty, validation, and destructive states.
Do keep dense screens readable with 14px minimum control text, 16px body text, and 15-20px card padding.
donts: Don't make the product feel like a generic SaaS landing page or AI-generated marketing template.
Don't use glassmorphism, neon gradients, decorative grid backgrounds, or novelty motion as the default app language.
Don't add gradient text, large side-stripe card borders, decorative blur-heavy ghost cards, or oversized 32px-plus card radii.
Don't mix public purple, auth orange, and admin blue as equal primary actions on one screen.
Don't hide security, authorization, destructive actions, disabled states, or validation errors behind subtle styling.
Don't introduce a new visual dialect for one module when a Bootstrap-compatible card, button, form, table, modal, or offcanvas pattern already exists.
